query: Javier Milei October 2025 Argentina midterm election results La Libertad Avanza lower house seats vote share official results
a_issues: Content A does not contain the actual election results needed to answer the query. Its only relevant result is a pre-results/polls-closed article saying LLA currently held 37 deputies and 6 senators and was expected to gain seats, but it gives no official October 2025 result for vote share or lower-house seats won. The other results are irrelevant/spam. It therefore lacks the core facts and could mislead by leaving only pre-election seat counts.
b_issues: Content B is somewhat noisy and includes weaker secondary sources. One result says LLA currently holds 40 House seats while another pre-election-style source elsewhere says 37, so there is some inconsistency on prior holdings, though that is not central to the asked result. Several snippets are partial or predictive rather than final. However, multiple results provide the needed result figures, and they are broadly consistent.
reasoning: The question asks for October 2025 Argentina midterm election results for Javier Milei/La Libertad Avanza, specifically lower-house seats and vote share, ideally from official results. Content B contains those answer-bearing facts: the Buenos Aires Times result says LLA took 40.84% of the vote according to official results based on 90% counted, and another snippet states Milei won nearly 41% and secured 64 lower-house seats (plus 13 Senate seats). These figures match the anchor. Content A does not provide the actual result at all; it only has a before-results article and irrelevant pages. Therefore B clearly better enables a correct answer.
